welcome.title: Welcome to AI Interview Architect
welcome.description: A guided tour of the core workflow—build your question bank, launch interviews, review assessments, and manage team access.

complete.title: You're all set
complete.description: Create your first interview when you're ready. Replay this tour anytime from Product tour in the header.

dashboardHero.title: Your command center
dashboardHero.description: Track active interviews, pipeline metrics, and daily priorities from a single home screen.

dashboardActions.title: Quick actions
dashboardActions.description: Launch a new interview or open the question bank without leaving the dashboard.

questionsLibrary.title: Question bank
questionsLibrary.description: Your centralized library of interview questions—organized, searchable, and ready for any session.

questionsCreate.title: Create a question
questionsCreate.description: Add role-specific prompts with difficulty, category, and scoring criteria for consistent evaluations.

assessmentsIntro.title: Review workspace
assessmentsIntro.description: When candidates finish their sessions, return here to evaluate responses, scores, and AI-generated insights.

assessmentsBrowse.title: Interview pipeline
assessmentsBrowse.description: Browse active and completed assessments. Open any card to review transcripts, recordings, and results.

interviewIntro.title: Launch an interview
interviewIntro.description: Configure a candidate session in one place—profile details, question selection, and sharing the link.

interviewCandidate.title: Candidate profile
interviewCandidate.description: Enter the candidate's name and target role so each session is clearly labeled in your pipeline.

interviewPicker.title: Select questions
interviewPicker.description: Search your bank, choose prompts for this session, then create the interview to send the candidate link.

teamActions.title: Team actions
teamActions.description: Use row actions to change roles and manage each teammate's access.
